description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to main, on every pull request, and on a scheduled cron job. The workflow has two jobs: build and mypy. The build job runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of Python versions 3.11 and 3.13, and environments. It checks out the repository, sets up a conda environment, installs cf_xarray, runs tests with pytest, and uploads code coverage to Codecov. The mypy job runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of Python versions 3.11 and 3.13, checks out the repository, sets up a conda environment, installs cf_xarray and mypy, runs mypy, and uploads mypy coverage to Codecov.
